headline: Earnings To Watch: Amgen (AMGN) Reports Q1 Results Tomorrow
summary: Biotech company Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) will be announcing earnings results this Thursday afternoon. Here’s what investors should know.

headline: FDA tests out ‘real-time’ clinical trials; AbbVie closes in on a KRAS biotech
summary: Through two pioneering studies, Amgen and AstraZeneca will share study data with FDA scientists as it’s accrued. Elsewhere, Lilly inked a gene editing deal and Pfizer reported success for a multiple myeloma drug.

headline: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals: Q1 Beat Driven By Dupixent And Eylea HD Strength
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Q1 results: Eylea HD sales up 52%, Sanofi collaboration revenue +36%, $803M buybacks. Click for this REGN earnings update.
